scripts.verify: node tools/verify.mjs && node tools/verify-quiz.mjs && node tools/verify-typing.mjs && node tools/verify-studio.mjs && node tools/test-studio-engine.mjs && node tools/test-roundtrip.mjs && node tools/test-studio-regression.mjs && node tools/verify-gamelab.mjs && node tools/gen-cards.mjs --check
scripts.deploy: npm run verify && npm run build && rm -rf docs && cp -r dist docs && git add -A && git commit -m deploy && git push
